---
title: "Antibodies"
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, error=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("helpers.R")

antibodies <- read.csv("data/Antibodies.csv")

dplyr::group_by(antibodies[, c("ABID_base", "INN.or.Clinical.mAb.linked", "Name.of.Antibody.in.the.publication")], 
                ABID_base, INN.or.Clinical.mAb.linked) |>
  dplyr::summarise(publication_names = paste0(sort(unique(Name.of.Antibody.in.the.publication)), collapse = ", "), n = length(ABID_base)) |>
  DT::datatable(escape = FALSE, 
                style = "bootstrap5",
                class = "wrap",
                filter = "top",
                extensions = "Buttons", 
                rownames = FALSE,
                options = list(pageLength = 50,
                               dom = "Bfrtip",
                               buttons = c("copy", "csv"),
                               columnDefs = list(
                                 list(targets = 0, render = DT::JS("function(data, type, row, meta) {
                      return '<a href=\"antibodies/' + data + '.html\" target=\"_blank\">' + data + '</a>';
                    }"))
                    )
                ))
```
